description: This pipeline reads in a folder, applies image enhancement and thresholding, and saves the results. The main steps include reading in the folder, applying enhancement and thresholding to each file, and saving the resulting images.

58ab36da-0797-49d1-82ce-948eb0f49ef2.name: ij1-set-lut-from-color-map
58ab36da-0797-49d1-82ce-948eb0f49ef2.description: Sets the LUT of the image from a predefined color map. This does not change the pixel data.

0d7c9952-d60f-42c1-9d2e-1aba861b0620.name: ij1-contrast-histogram-enhancer
0d7c9952-d60f-42c1-9d2e-1aba861b0620.description: Implementation of the ImageJ contrast enhancer feature that uses histograms and normalization methods.
